title: Iteration over a dictionary key-value pairs should be done with the items method call
description: Iterates over a dictionary using keys or values instead of the items method.
message: Iteration over a dictionary using keys or values instead of the items method.
recommendation: Use the items method for iteration.

noncompliant.code:
for key, value in my_dict.items():
    print(key, value)

for key in my_dict:
    print(key, my_dict[key])

compliant.code:
for key, value in my_dict.items():
    print(key, value)

why_is_this_an_issue: Using keys or values instead of the items method can lead to inconsistent iteration behavior, particularly when dealing with dictionaries with multiple values for a single key.
how_to_fix: Use the items method for iteration.

metadata.title: Iteration over a dictionary key-value pairs should be done with the items method call
